creator: dougs@dawnsign.com
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #1)

Still seeing the same error following your suggested actions as follows:


1. pkg delete aws-sdk-cpp

root@scutum:~ # pkg delete aws-sdk-cpp
No packages matched for pattern 'aws-sdk-cpp'

Checking integrity... done (0 conflicting)
1 packages requested for removal: 0 locked, 1 missing
root@scutum:~ # cd /usr/ports
root@scutum:/usr/ports #


2. pkg clean
